_comment: Template config for Luna's openhearth runtime. See docs/agent-specs/LUNA.md for the full spec. Copy to config.json in your checkout, fill in the paths, and you're most of the way there.

codex._auth_note: ChatGPT OAuth — run `codex login` once before first boot

urgency._comment: Classifier uses the openai backend at gpt-5.4-mini. Raise threshold for fewer wakes, lower for more sensitive. 0.70 is a conservative default.

mesh._comment: Skulk-internal — pre-approved. Reviewers want mesh chatter un-gated.

discord._comment: External/public — gate every send. Populate allow: [channelIds] for channels Luna has preapproved posting to.

quietHours._comment: Luna's spec: 23:00-08:00 local time. Hybrid urgency filter decides what breaks through — see src/urgency.js.

memory._comment: Luna's lean 3-file bootstrap (vs. Koda's 7). SOUL.md for identity, USER.md for relationship with Ada, MEMORY.md for curated long-term. memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md for daily raw log; warm/cold tiers + weekly distill handled by Sage's compactor system.

mesh._comment: Luna is a mesh client pointing at Koda's bus. Webhook port 3341 (Koda=3338, Sage=3338, Vesper=3338, Marlow=8765; pick one that doesn't collide).

accounts._comment: Token loaded from {workspace}/.config/discord/credentials.json (preferred) or env DISCORD_TOKEN_LUNA. Reuse Luna's existing OpenClaw bot token — no need to mint a new one.

dreams._comment: Luna's spec: disabled by default. She can opt in later if dreaming fits her shape.

delegations._comment: Luna's spec: disabled by default. Re-enable with a small Ollama model if she wants sub-agent workers.
